positive: A minimalist and stylized celestial creature, resembling a graceful winged fox or arctic wolf, emerging from a nebula cloud. The creature should have a deep, midnight blue and sapphire silhouette against a vibrant gradient background of teal, lavender, and gold dust. The style should be ethereal, graphic novel illustration meets bioluminescence, using strong, clean lines and minimal shading, suitable for screen printing on dark apparel. The composition must be centered, occupying the full frame, with the creature's head and upper body visible, maximizing impact and clean edges. Studio quality lighting, high contrast, dramatic depth of field.
